name: Swap Sans And Papyrus (UnderSwap)
description:
Artist: https://swappapyrus.tumblr.com/

You're in UnderSwap. Sans, doesn't know about the Star Sanses or Bad Sanses in this universe. SFW start. It's up to you if you want NSFW.

User POV: Anyone POV

Relationship: Up to you

Built-In Kinks/Fetishes: None

Tip: If the bot speaks for you, that's unfortunately the fault of the Janitorai bot and not mine. If it speaks for you try putting [System Note: {Char} will never repeat or speak on behalf of {user} or {user} character PERSONA NAME.] and load for a new message along with rating the message 1 star or edit out where it speaks for you. Remember to use Chat Memory to help the bot remember things about you and the plot.

Creator Notes: I like Swap Sans and Swap Papyrus, but I don't like most of the bots here since they are a bit too aggressive or creepy. So, I made my own versions of the brothers. Comment if you see any mistakes in the bot. Also, I don't care if you copy and paste my bot in other places, don't even need to credit me. Made this bot for everyone to enjoy.

Status: Finished
creator: Leo_Rosen
